title: fix(deps): update module github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4 to v4.26.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil) | `v4.26.1` → `v4.26.2` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fshirou%2fgopsutil%2fv4/v4.26.2?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fshirou%2fgopsutil%2fv4/v4.26.1/v4.26.2?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>shirou/gopsutil (github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4)</summary>

### [`v4.26.2`](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/releases/tag/v4.26.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/compare/v4.26.1...v4.26.2)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v4.26.2 -->

#### What's Changed

##### disk

- \[disk]\[linux]: fix Device set to "none" for virtual filesystems by [@​skartikey](https://redirect.github.com/skartikey) in [#​2002](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/2002)
- fix(disk): skip drives returning ERROR\_INVALID\_FUNCTION or ERROR\_NOT\_SUPPORTED in IOCounters on Windows by [@​jose-manuel-almaza](https://redirect.github.com/jose-manuel-almaza) in [#​2003](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/2003)
- \[linux]\[disk]: fix disk mountinfo parsing bug by [@​shirou](https://redirect.github.com/shirou) in [#​2007](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/2007)

##### host

- refactor: move timeSince and timeSinceMillis to common package by [@​Dylan-M](https://redirect.github.com/Dylan-M) in [#​1998](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1998)

##### process

- \[common]\[process]: fix gosec lint by [@​shirou](https://redirect.github.com/shirou) in [#​2006](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/2006)

##### Other Changes

- \[doc]: Update 'golang' to 'Go' for consistency by [@​alexandear](https://redirect.github.com/alexandear) in [#​1993](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1993)

#### New Contributors

- [@​alexandear](https://redirect.github.com/alexandear) made their first contribution in [#​1993](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1993)
- [@​jose-manuel-almaza](https://redirect.github.com/jose-manuel-almaza) made their first contribution in [#​2003](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/2003)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/shirou/gopsutil/compare/v4.26.1...v4.26.2>

</details>
